title: Avoid complex constants in Spring Data methods
description: Methods returning 'Page' or 'Slice' in Spring Data should always take a 'Pageable' parameter. This ensures efficient pagination and prevents unexpected data retrieval issues. Refactoring methods to include 'Pageable' improves maintainability and performance.
recommendation: Add a 'Pageable' parameter to all repository methods returning 'Page' or 'Slice'.

checks.message: Spring Data method returning Page or Slice should take a Pageable parameter.
